mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id, sort_order FROM orgs ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, name, org_id, active FROM members ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM orgs WHERE parent_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM %s
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orgs(name, parent_id, sort_order) VALUES(%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE orgs SET name=%s WHERE id=%s
UPDATE members SET org_id=NULL WHERE org_id=%s
UPDATE orgs SET sort_order=%s WHERE id=%s
UPDATE members SET org_id=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, o.name as org_name FROM members m LEFT JOIN orgs o ON o.id = m.org_id ORDER BY m.sort_order, m.id
SELECT menu_name, restaurant_name, price FROM orders WHERE orderer_name=%s AND order_date=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY ordered_at
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders WHERE orderer_name=%s
SELECT id FROM members WHERE name=%s
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM members
SELECT * FROM members WHERE id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET active=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM members WHERE name=%s AND id!=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET orderer_name=%s WHERE orderer_name=%s
UPDATE members SET name=%s, active=%s, work_location=%s WHERE id=%s
UPDATE members SET sort_order=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE active=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM menu_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM addons WHERE restaurant_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM sides WHERE restaurant_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO restaurants(name,emoji,type,color) VALUES(%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE restaurants SET name=%s,emoji=%s,type=%s,phone=%s,hours=%s, price_limit=%s,address=%s,note=%s,color=%s,order_disabled=%s, holiday_days=%s,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
UPDATE restaurants SET active=0 WHERE id=%s
UPDATE restaurants SET holiday_days=%s,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM menus WHERE restaurant_id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET available=%s,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
UPDATE menus SET name=%s,price=%s,emoji=%s,description=%s,tag=%s, available=%s,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
UPDATE menus SET sort_order=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM addon_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND name=%s
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM addon_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM addons WHERE restaurant_id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE addons SET name=%s,extra_price=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM side_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND name=%s
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM side_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as next_so FROM sides WHERE restaurant_id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE sides SET name=%s,extra_price=%s WHERE id=%s
